name: Apple-Cranberry Cobbler
recipeIngredient: 6 Granny Smith apples, peeled and cored (3/4 inch)
recipeInstructions:
1. Toss together the apples, sugar, and lemon juice.
2. Place in a 2-quart ovenproof glass dish.
3. Beat together the butter and sugar.
4. Mix together the flour, baking soda, and salt.
5. Mix the beaten egg into the butter and sugar.
6. Combine half of the flour mixture with the buttermilk.
7. Add the remaining flour mixture to the buttermilk and lemon zest.
8. Spread the batter over the fruit.
9. Bake for 45 minutes at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
